properties.body:
[Western Baltic] GERMAN NAV WARN 315/26
241830 UTC MAY
GERMAN NAV WARN 315/26
241830 UTC MAY.
WESTERN BALTIC. DECLARED AREA TODENDORF/PUTLOS.
MILITARY PRACTICES FROM 25- 31 MAY 0900- 1700 UTC.
IN THE CAUTION AREA OF PUTLOS AND TODENDORF FIRING PRACTICES WILL BE PERFORMED IF THE SHOOTING RANGE IS CLEAR. THE AREA WILL REMAIN OPEN FOR NAVIGATION. MARINERS ARE REQUESTED TO WATCH THE SIGNALS OF THE PATROL VESSELS
CANCEL THIS MSG 311700 UTC MAY
